title: Event Planning Checklist
scenario: Write a sample event planning checklist that captures essential tasks and deadlines for a successful event. The output should be in a simple list format.
constraints: Must include essential tasks, deadlines, and responsible personnel
Use bullet points to break up the checklist

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt includes the required details (essential tasks, deadlines, responsible personnel) and uses bullet points.
Verify if the event planning checklist captures essential tasks, deadlines, and responsible personnel.
Evaluate if the list format is consistent throughout the checklist.
